title: Keyword Solver Upgrade, MD Plans Tracking Mode, and others

texts: Renamed Keyword Solver to Team Solver. Added the ability to handle additional statuses and identity tags/factions. Deployed Sinners has been changed to Max Sinners and the solver can now give teams with less sinners than specified if they still meet the requirements.
Added tracking mode to MD Plans. Activate it to mark gifts as obtained or theme packs as entered to follow the plan easier.
Rewrote part of the authentication code to potentially fix an issue where people can randomly get logged out unexpectedly during extended idle periods or when using multiple tabs.
Made some adjustments to how MD Plans are displayed, particularly on mobile.
Added Trash Crab Brain Wine and Filial Love to the Universal Gifts page.
Fixed an issue in the pagination of search results and comments where the prev button disappears if you reach the end.
Increased MD Plans search results page size from 20 to 30 items.
Changed base identities and E.G.Os to be owned by default for the Company page.
Fixed an issue in the tags/factions dropdown in the identities page where styling isn't applied properly to some options.
Fixed team builds in the encounters page collapsing to one column.
